case_title: SANDRA H. BROWN VS. ENTERPRISE CAR SHARE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, SANDRA H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE CAR SHARE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11-16-16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,480.00 FILED BY BROWN, SANDRA H. AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE CAR SHARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, SANDRA H. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVED SERVED OCT-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE CAR SHARE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SANDRA H. BROWN & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MELANIE LOCICERO, RISK SUPERVISOR FOR ENTERPRISE CAR SHARE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
